newsitems.title: Save up to 75% Off During the RGG Studio Developer Sale
newsitems.author: SOASonali
newsitems.contents:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45791406/3e05133be53d5eaea0f61ee046a2b0d7d8a2b4d9.png[/img]

[h1]GET UP TO 75% OFF[/h1]
Explore these limited-time deals before they're gone! Now until June 18, get the lowest prices ever on select RGG Studio games like:
[list]
[*]The Yakuza series’ prequel story Yakuza 0 Director’s Cut (40% off)
[*]Best-in-class JPRG Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth (75% off)
[*]Spinoffs including Like a Dragon: Pirate Yakuza in Hawaii (75% off)
[*]The latest from the original 3D fighting series Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage (up to 50% off)

…and so much more!
[/list]
[url=https://store.steampowered.com/sale/rggstudiodevelopersale]Check out all the deals here![/url]

[previewyoutube=OvXbWrhVnEU;full][/previewyoutube]

[h1]LEARN MORE ABOUT STRANGER THAN HEAVEN[/h1]
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4260840/STRANGER_THAN_HEAVEN/?curator_clanid=32528477
Prepare for the all-new action-adventure from RGG Studio: a fifty-year, action-adventure saga of men with nowhere to go and their desperate struggle to find a home. Use extreme violence to survive, and musical talent to thrive as a showman across five cities and eras of modern Japan.

Keep an eye on our social channels for more. 
-The Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio Team 

[p][url="https://x.com/RGGStudio" style="button"]Twitter[/url] [url="https://www.tiktok.com/@rggstudiowest" style="button"]TikTok[/url] [url="https://www.facebook.com/RGGStudioWest" style="button"]Facebook [/url] [url="https://www.instagram.com/rggstudiowest/" style="button"]Instagram[/url][/p]

newsitems.title: Yakuza Kiwami 3 & Dark Ties is Now Available!
newsitems.author: SOASonali
newsitems.contents:
[h1]PLAY IT NOW [/h1]
[h3]STEAM DECK VERIFIED[/h3]
The wait is over. Jump into the two-in-one experience and play the extreme remake & brand-new action-packed adventure now.

[previewyoutube=XhT_Nhi8YoM;full][/previewyoutube]


[b][h2]GET YAKUZA KIWAMI 3 & DARK TIES NOW[/h2][/b]A legend is reborn and a new legacy begins in the extreme remake of Yakuza 3, evolving every aspect of the game and adding Dark Ties, a brand-new tale of Yoshitaka Mine included as a separate experience. 

https://store.steampowered.com/app/3937550/Yakuza_Kiwami_3__Dark_Ties/

Keep an eye on our social channels for more Like a Dragon & Yakuza series content.
-The Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio Team

newsitems.title: Love wins: This woman has 'married' a cardboard cutout of Kazuma Kiryu from the Like a Dragon games
newsitems.author: Justin Wagner
newsitems.contents: It no longer matters whether you believe RPGs should have more romance in them or less; the tender bonds between gamer and NPC have broken their containment in worlds virtual. At a recent event held by Sega celebrating the Like a Dragon series' 20th anniversary, a woman who goes by lala_nyan0617 on X donned a wedding dress and locked arms (er, tried to) with her new (pretend) husband: a cardboard cutout of Kazuma Kiryu from Like a Dragon... Read more.
